name: instant-api — connection_url.decrypted > 50/h per team [credential harvesting]
description: Warn when a single team decrypts more than 50 connection URLs in a rolling 1h window. Legitimate dashboard usage is bounded (one resource list call per page-load, then targeted reveals). A burst means either a runaway script or — worse — a compromised session token scraping every credential before rotation. Source: the connection_url.decrypted audit event emitted by api/internal/crypto in the W7-C audit pass; team_id is the facet that drives the per-team threshold.

nrql.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'connection_url.decrypted' FACET team_id
